name: Pecan Pie Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. CRUST: Combine flour, butter (2 sticks), sugar, and salt in a bowl until it resembles crumbs.
2. Grease the bottom and sides of a 15" x 10-inch baking pan with at least 1-1/2 inches depth.
3. Press the mixture firmly into the pan.
4. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes.
5. FILLING: In a bowl, beat eggs, corn syrup, sugar (1-1/2 cups), melted butter (3 tbsp), and vanilla.
6. Stir in chopped pecans.
7. Spread filling over the hot crust.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 25 minutes or until set.
9. Allow to cool before cutting into bars.
